overview: RegenCen provides physician-led hormone therapy, longevity medicine, and regenerative care for midlife women and men. Their approach includes bioidentical hormone therapy, testosterone replacement, and medical weight loss, all delivered through their RegenHRT™ protocol.
highlights: Hormone pellet therapy with 5-6 month delivery
NAD+ IV therapy and PRF regenerative treatments
targetAudience: Men and women in midlife and beyond seeking to optimize hormone health and longevity.
